session.assistant:
Plan execution complete.
## Summary
Updated `issue_number` references across **27 files** in `docs/learned/` to align with the source code rename (Objective #8381, Node 6.3).
**Key renames applied:** - `state.issue_number` → `state.plan_id` - `parse_issue_number_from_url` → `parse_plan_number_from_url` - `PlanContext.issue_number` → `PlanContext.plan_id` - `PlanRowData.issue_number` → `PlanRowData.plan_id` - `get_issue_number()` → `get_plan_number()` - `P{issue_number}` branch naming → `plnd/` prefix
**Intentionally preserved references (~25 occurrences):** - Legacy format documentation (describing old `IssueReference` fields) - Generic GitHub API endpoints and parameters - `update-objective-node` JSON output (objective issue numbers, not plans) - Fake GitHub mutation tracking (generic GitHub issue API tuples) - Anti-pattern examples showing what NOT to do
**CI:** All tests pass (5,685 + 136 + 115 + 24). Prettier failures are pre-existing in unrelated files.
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8884
